senses.definition_en: the physical or mental power or skill needed to do something

examples.en: She has the ability to solve complex problems quickly.
examples.fa: او توانایی حل سریع مسائل پیچیده را دارد.

examples.en: Reading ability varies a lot between children of the same age.
examples.fa: توانایی خواندن در کودکان هم‌سن بسیار متفاوت است.

idioms.phrase: to the best of one's ability
idioms.example_en: I promise to help you to the best of my ability.
idioms.example_fa: قول می‌دهم تا حد توانم به شما کمک کنم.

notes: Almost always followed by "to" + verb: "the ability to do something", not "the ability of doing something".
